hooks.command: echo '=== QFault Session Start ===' && echo '' && cat memory-bank/activeContext.md
echo '' && echo '=== Session ended. Run /log before /clear to save state. ===' && echo 'Quick test status:' && ./scripts/quick-test.sh 2>&1 | tail -5 || echo '(quick-test.sh not yet available)'
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git push\|git commit'; then echo 'REMINDER: Run ./scripts/quick-test.sh before committing.'; fi
